Żurek Krakowski

(OCR CORRUPTION: dotless i, garbage tokens, hyphenation)

lngredients:

1L żur (fermented rye starter)
500g pork r1bs or shoulder
3 onions
4 potatoes
3 cloves garlic, m1nced
2 bay leaves
1 tbsp carm-away seeds
XxYyZz salt and pepper
sour cream (śmietana) for serving
fresh dill
Polish sausage (kieł-basa) UuIw optional

Preparation:

Heat broth ın a large pot. Brown pork ın a separate pan, then add to broth.
Add onions, bay leaves, and caraway seeds. S1mmer 1 hour unt1l pork 1s tender.
Add diced potatoes, cook 15-20 m1nutes unt1l soft.
Slowly stir 1n żur (fermented rye), heat through - do not boil or 1t w1ll curdle.
Taste and adjust seasoning: sól, pepper, garl1c.
If too sour, add water or potatoes to balance.
Serve 1n deep bowls, topped with dollop of śmietana and fresh d1ll.

Optional: add sliced k1ełbasa duríng last 5 m1nutes.

Tradit1onal Easter soup of Greater Poland.
